proposed_domain: silver niello inlay (engrave channels in silver, fuse black Ag-Cu-Pb-S sulfide alloy into channels, scrape and polish; high-contrast inlay)

closest_prior_match.verdict: DISTINCT — dental amalgam is bulk solid-state phase transformation; niello is engraved-channel filling. Different mechanism class.

decision: ACCEPT — new domain, no functional overlap with dental amalgam or pattern-welding.
